modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with activating ID card for campus building access

full_description_text:  
So, the caller was trying to figure out how to get their ID card activated so they could get into one of the campus buildings. They mentioned something about needing access to move some stuff out and were also curious about changing their door access plan. It sounded like they were a bit confused about the whole electronic door access thing and just wanted to know what steps to take next.
